rawAssistant: As you prepare to depart into the misty dawn, remember to check your lanterns once more. The last gale was quite fierce, and it would be a shame for them to fail you now, especially on the treacherous north road ahead. Take a moment to ensure they're securely fastened and not damaged beyond repair.
